final_answer: When a distance calculation is attempted on geographic coordinates, diagnose the CRS risk and add the projection-to-meters strategy into the experience library. 已按主系统工具链执行。 根据经验，距离分析前需要检查 CRS 并统一到米制投影。 distance geographic coordinates CRS diagnose projection-to-meters
